item.name: Chat

request.description: Send a message to ChatGPT and start a new conversation. The conversation_id will be null for the first message.
Continue an existing conversation by providing the conversation_id and full message history for context.
Check if the chat API service is running and healthy.

item.description: Chat-related API endpoints for interacting with ChatGPT
